fields.title: Sport in our life
fields.text: Sport is very important for health. You need to do exercises in the morning. You can run or swim. I love playing football. It is fun and useful. Sport helps to be strong and resilient. Sport also disciplines. I do sports every day and feel great.

fields.title: Why education is important
fields.text: Education gives knowledge. Without knowledge it is difficult to find a job. You need to study well at school. Then you will enter the institute. And then you will find a good job. Education develops the brain. You become smarter and more interesting for other people. You need to learn all your life.

fields.title: Holidays will be extended
fields.text: Students are waiting for good news. Summer holidays will be extended for a week. You can rest longer. Lessons will start only on September 7. This decision was made by the Ministry of Education. Schoolchildren were very happy with this news.
